1. First midterm is next Monday, Feb 23rd
-- we will provide the bubble sheet for the MC part
2. DSP for first midterm: GPB 100, 5 pm.
3. Review Session: Q&A, Thurs, Feb 19th 5 pm
Place: Physics 4
4. Prepare
Lectures: Anything said in class to be fair game for the exam.
Textbook: Responsible for section headings and key terms.
You should understand the figures.
Reader articles: Major conceptual themes, methods, key results

Human Functional Neuroim

Roster Groups
Tools
End
Measuring metabolic correlates of neural activity
Neural activity demands lots of oxygen
Positron Emission Tomography (PET)
Inject radioactive tracer such as 150
Measure location of decaying isotopes
Functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI)
Accessible
non-invasive (no radioactive tracer)
lower cost
